DARV.talk.SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CHARACTER_SPA: Whoa! How long has it been?! ...Wait, or are you the past you!?
[i][font_size=22]The Space-Time Witch shook her head, then nodded.[/font_size][/i]
We meet again! Come on, take a look at this pile and pick one out!
Hey, that thing you gave me way back, I've been holding onto it for so long and it's been real handy! But I figure it's about time I gave it back to ya!
[i][font_size=22]The Space-Time Witch shook her head and pulled an identical one from a rift.[/font_size][/i]
Well I'll be! You've got another one just like it?! Haha, then I won't be shy about keeping it in my stash!
NONUPEIPE.talk.SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CHARACTE: In all my long years, I have never beheld... an existence as [sine]radiant[/sine] as you.
My dear, I believe this will suit you perfectly.
[i][font_size=22]The Space-Time Witch gifted a crystal orb to Nonupeipe.[/font_size][/i]
I have received countless treasures, but your gift... has shown me unparalleled beauty.
OROBAS.talk.SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CHARACTER_S: Never seen!! A being like this!! What are you??
[i][font_size=22]The Space-Time Witch let her hand dissipate halfway, then coalesce again.[/font_size][/i]
[jitter]Waaaaah!![/jitter] Amazing!! So special!! How did you do that?? Show me more!!
[i][font_size=22]The Space-Time Witch softly explained the principles.[/font_size][/i]
Tell more!! More!! More interesting things!!
That book!! What's inside?? Stories? Secrets?? Tell me!!
[i][font_size=22]The Space-Time Witch opened the book, and each page displayed visions from another spacetime.[/font_size][/i]
[jitter]Waaaaaah!![/jitter] Every page is moving!! So many worlds!! So many pictures!! How did that all fit in there?? So amazing!! I want to see!! I want to see!!!
PAEL.talk.SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CHARACTER_SPA: [thinky_dots]I feel like I've dreamed of you before... a very long time ago...[/thinky_dots]
[thinky_dots]I can sense it... you have slumbered... longer than I...[/thinky_dots]
[i][font_size=22]Pael fell asleep during the long silence.[/font_size][/i]
TANX.talk.SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CHARACTER_SPA: [b]COME OUT!! FIGHT ME FAIR AND SQUARE!![/b]
[i][font_size=22]The Space-Time Witch controlled her strength and fought using abilities from different spacetimes.[/font_size][/i]
TEZCATARA.talk.SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CHARACTE: Come sit a while, dear. Let my fire warm you.
[i][font_size=22]The Space-Time Witch enjoyed a hot cocoa made by Tezcatara.[/font_size][/i]
Come in, dear! What would you like to eat today?
[i][font_size=22]The Space-Time Witch visited Tezcatara carrying a basket of cookies.[/font_size][/i]
Oh my, dear! You've come back to visit this old lady, and you even brought [jitter][b]cookies[/b][/jitter]! What a thoughtful little sweetie, come here, let me get a good look at you!
VAKUU.talk.SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CHARACTER_SP: [sine]You refused the contract, because you foresaw me ending up like this?[/sine]
[sine]You saw it long ago, didn't you?[/sine]
[sine]Come sign this contract...[/sine] For you, it's only a little bit of energy.
[i][font_size=22]The Space-Time Witch took a relic and walked away.[/font_size][/i]
[sine]Hmph... you're just as empty as this projection.[/sine]
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CHAR: What are you doing here again.
[i][font_size=22]The Space-Time Witch gazed at the Corrupt Heart, offering no reply.[/font_size][/i]
[i][font_size=22]The Space-Time Witch attacked the Architect just as the others had.[/font_size][/i]
...What is it you came here wanting.
[i][font_size=22]The Space-Time Witch attacked the Architect, like the others had.[/font_size][/i]
[i][font_size=22]The Space-Time Witch still did not answer.[/font_size][/i]
[i][font_size=22]The Space-Time Witch routinely attacked the Architect.[/font_size][/i]
[i][font_size=22]The Space-Time Witch routinely attacked the Architect.[/font_size][/i]
